Enterprise-grade security
Built with privacy at the core

ISO 27001

Compliant
Recognized worldwide for information security. Protects your data through rigorous controls that maintain confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

ISO 27701

Compliant
Global privacy management standard. Ensures personal data is handled responsibly, transparently, and in alignment with GDPR.

GDPR

Compliant
Rigorous privacy protections that keep your data in line with Europe’s strictest regulations.

SOC2

Compliant
Independently verified systems that meet industry standards for security, availability, and confidentiality.

HIPAA

Compliant
Healthcare-grade safeguards protect medical and personal information with strict compliance to industry standards.

EN 18031

Compliant
Meets European cybersecurity standards for secure wireless communication.
Learn More
Recommended by
Law by Mike

"Plaud Note Pro isn't just a note taker. While it records, I can snap photos in app that are highlighted as labeled evidence. So I can focus on analyzing the riots!"

School of hard knock

"It's perfect for in-person meetings and doesn't drain your phone battery if you're trying to record. Plaud is literally like having a second brain that's organized, never distracted, and always on."

UrAvgConsumer

"This little guy is a wearable device that lets me capture and analyze audio recordings and it puts together a transcript summary like a lot more. Whether you’re a creator, professional, or just hate taking notes, Plaud AI voice recorders do the work for you!"

Featured in global media

"The Plaud Note Pro automatically switches between recording calls and in-person meetings, eliminating the need for the physical toggle on the original Plaud Note released in 20...

"The company said that the Note Pro has four MEMS (Micro-Electro-Mechanical Systems) mics, compared with two on the last-gen device, to better capture audio. Because of this, th...

"This handy AI voice recorder has changed the way I work - here's how. Plaud Note offers a better way of recording voice notes, and optional subscription extends its very handy ...
